---
title: "PurpleAir_QC"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 6
    toc_float: true
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
### LOAD DATA

# file paths
path_full <- "/Users/lewiswhite/CHAP_columbia/GRAPHS/exposure_analysis/weekly_data_checks/purpleair/appended_full_data/purpleair_appended_full.rds"
path_new  <- "/Users/lewiswhite/CHAP_columbia/GRAPHS/exposure_analysis/weekly_data_checks/purpleair/processed/purpleair_processed_2026-03-10.rds"

# load data
purpleair_full <- readRDS(path_full)
purpleair_new  <- readRDS(path_new)

# create community_id if needed
if (!"community_id" %in% names(purpleair_full) && "vname" %in% names(purpleair_full)) {
  purpleair_full$community_id <- purpleair_full$vname
}
if (!"community_id" %in% names(purpleair_new) && "vname" %in% names(purpleair_new)) {
  purpleair_new$community_id <- purpleair_new$vname
}

# ensure timestamp is POSIXct
purpleair_full$timestamp <- as.POSIXct(purpleair_full$timestamp, tz = "UTC")
purpleair_new$timestamp  <- as.POSIXct(purpleair_new$timestamp, tz = "UTC")

# normalize A/B sensor names if needed
normalize_ab_cols <- function(df) {
  if (!"pm2_5_atm_a_" %in% names(df) && "pm2_5_atm_a" %in% names(df)) {
    df$pm2_5_atm_a_ <- df$pm2_5_atm_a
  }
  if (!"pm2_5_atm_b_" %in% names(df) && "pm2_5_atm_b" %in% names(df)) {
    df$pm2_5_atm_b_ <- df$pm2_5_atm_b
  }
  if (!"diff" %in% names(df) && all(c("pm2_5_atm_a_","pm2_5_atm_b_") %in% names(df))) {
    df$diff <- abs(df$pm2_5_atm_a_ - df$pm2_5_atm_b_)
  }
  if (!"perdiff" %in% names(df) && all(c("pm2_5_atm_a_","pm2_5_atm_b_") %in% names(df))) {
    df$perdiff <- abs(df$pm2_5_atm_a_ - df$pm2_5_atm_b_) / df$pm2_5_atm_a_
    df$perdiff <- ifelse(is.infinite(df$perdiff), NA, df$perdiff)
  }
  df
}

purpleair_full <- normalize_ab_cols(purpleair_full)
purpleair_new  <- normalize_ab_cols(purpleair_new)

# filter out implausibly old timestamps for reporting only
purpleair_full_qc <- purpleair_full %>%
  filter(timestamp >= as.POSIXct("2024-01-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  distinct(community_id, timestamp, .keep_all = TRUE)

purpleair_new_qc <- purpleair_new %>%
  filter(timestamp >= as.POSIXct("2024-01-01 00:00:00", tz = "UTC")) %>%
  distinct(community_id, timestamp, .keep_all = TRUE)

# quick sanity checks
range(purpleair_full_qc$timestamp, na.rm = TRUE)
range(purpleair_new_qc$timestamp, na.rm = TRUE)
table(is.na(purpleair_full_qc$pm2_5_atm_final))

```


## Full appended dataset summary

### Full-data PM2.5 distribution by community 

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggboxplot(purpleair_full_qc, x = "community_id", y = "pm2_5_atm_final") +
  rotate_x_text() +
  ggtitle("Full dataset: PM2.5 distribution by community")
```


### Completeness

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
purpleair_list <- split(purpleair_full_qc, f = purpleair_full_qc$community_id)

completeness <- data.frame(community = character(), completeness = numeric())

for (i in seq_along(purpleair_list)) {
  df <- purpleair_list[[i]] %>% arrange(timestamp)

  n <- sum(!is.na(df$pm2_5_atm_final))
  expected <- as.numeric(difftime(max(df$timestamp), min(df$timestamp), units = "mins")) / 2
  comp <- ifelse(expected > 0, n / expected, NA_real_)

  if (is.nan(comp) | is.infinite(comp)) comp <- NA
  if (!is.na(comp) && comp > 1) comp <- 1

  completeness <- rbind(
    completeness,
    data.frame(community = names(purpleair_list)[i], completeness = comp)
  )
}

completeness <- completeness %>%
  mutate(community = fct_reorder(community, desc(completeness)))

ggplot(completeness, aes(x = community, y = completeness)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#0072B2", color = "grey30") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  rotate_x_text() +
  ylab("PM2.5 Completeness, %") +
  xlab("PurpleAir Community Monitor") +
  ggtitle("Overall completeness based on non-missing final PM2.5")
```


### completeness by year

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
purpleair_full_qc$year <- year(purpleair_full_qc$timestamp)

completeness_yr <- data.frame(community = character(), year = integer(), completeness = numeric())

for (yr in sort(unique(purpleair_full_qc$year))) {
  df_yr <- purpleair_full_qc %>% filter(year == yr)
  by_comm <- split(df_yr, f = df_yr$community_id)

  for (i in seq_along(by_comm)) {
    df <- by_comm[[i]] %>% arrange(timestamp)

    n <- sum(!is.na(df$pm2_5_atm_final))
    expected <- as.numeric(difftime(max(df$timestamp), min(df$timestamp), units = "mins")) / 2
    comp <- ifelse(expected > 0, n / expected, NA_real_)

    if (is.nan(comp) | is.infinite(comp)) comp <- NA
    if (!is.na(comp) && comp > 1) comp <- 1

    completeness_yr <- rbind(
      completeness_yr,
      data.frame(community = names(by_comm)[i], year = yr, completeness = comp)
    )
  }
}

ggplot(completeness_yr, aes(x = community, y = completeness)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#0072B2", color = "grey30") +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  rotate_x_text() +
  ylab("PM2.5 Completeness, %") +
  xlab("PurpleAir Community Monitor") +
  ggtitle("Yearly completeness based on non-missing final PM2.5")
```



## New data

### Weekly overview 

#### high level overview 

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
purpleair_new_qc %>%
  summarise(
    rows = n(),
    communities = n_distinct(community_id),
    start_time = min(timestamp, na.rm = TRUE),
    end_time = max(timestamp, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

#### boxplots 

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggboxplot(purpleair_new_qc, x = "community_id", y = "pm2_5_atm_final") +
  rotate_x_text() +
  labs(title = "Weekly upload: PM2.5 distribution by community",
       subtitle = "Communities with empty boxes indicate no data passed QC checks")
```

### Summary Plots (Sensor agreement, temp, RH)

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
for (i in sort(unique(purpleair_new_qc$community_id))) {
  cat(paste0("## Community: ", i, "\n\n"))

  df_all <- purpleair_new_qc %>% filter(community_id == i)
  df_pair <- df_all %>% filter(!is.na(pm2_5_atm_a_), !is.na(pm2_5_atm_b_))

  if (nrow(df_pair) >= 10) {
    p_scatter <- ggscatter(
      df_pair, x = "pm2_5_atm_a_", y = "pm2_5_atm_b_",
      add = "reg.line", conf.int = TRUE
    ) +
      labs(
        x = "Sensor A PM2.5",
        y = "Sensor B PM2.5",
        title = paste0("Weekly A vs B agreement: ", i)
      )
    print(p_scatter)
  } else {
    cat("*Not enough paired A/B observations to plot regression (n < 10).* \n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  p_ts_ab <- ggplot(df_all, aes(x = timestamp)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = pm2_5_atm_a_, color = "A"), alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_line(aes(y = pm2_5_atm_b_, color = "B"), alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      color = "Sensor",
      title = paste0("Weekly PM2.5 sensors over time: ", i),
      x = "Date",
      y = "PM2.5"
    )
  print(p_ts_ab)
  cat("\n\n")

  p_temp <- ggplot(df_all, aes(x = timestamp, y = tempf_updated)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Weekly temperature (F): ", i),
      x = "Date",
      y = "Temp (F)"
    )
  print(p_temp)
  cat("\n\n")

  p_rh <- ggplot(df_all, aes(x = timestamp, y = rh_updated)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Weekly relative humidity (%): ", i),
      x = "Date",
      y = "RH (%)"
    )
  print(p_rh)
  cat("\n\n***\n\n")
}
```
